productDisplayName: Nike Men Advantage Geometric Blue Jersey
description: Composition White polo T-shirt for men made of 88% polyester and 12% spandex, has short sleeves, mesh panels on the shoulders, spread collar with a buttoned chest placket, graphic print on the front and nike swoosh printed on the left chest Fit Standard Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Get casual with the utmost comfort in this nike T-shirt. Engineered with Dri-Fit technology, this tee wicks sweat away and keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the fashionable graphic print adds style. Pair this tee with your favourite denims and sports shoes.
